title: peucedanum collinum
intro: Peucedanum collinum, also known as Mountain Carrot or Carrot-root, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Peucedanum collinum are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as carotol and limonene, and have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peucedanum collinum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antioxidant. Peucedanum collinum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
